sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 22:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 22:1
items.html: Under the root the light of Keter, which stands under Malchut of the Rosh, since the ZON are the branches of that the light of Keter. (Item 9, and Inner Light)
